name: Wakala OS
tagline: Governed operating infrastructure by Codegx Technologies
description: Wakala OS is the Codegx operating layer for agentic workflows, structured business process execution, reporting, onboarding, and dependable operations.

services.title: Governed Workflow Systems
services.description: Structured workflow execution for approvals, handoffs, reporting, and recurring operational processes.

services.title: Agentic Process Control
services.description: AI-assisted execution designed around clear boundaries, escalation, and audit visibility.

services.title: Operational Intelligence
services.description: Dashboards, reporting systems, and decision-support surfaces that preserve context, evidence, and accountable visibility.

services.title: Document and Case Operations
services.description: Workflow systems for intake, classification, routing, review, audit trails, and controlled document processing.

services.title: Onboarding and Service Flows
services.description: Guided operating journeys for customers, staff, vendors, and internal service teams.

services.title: Governance and Support Layer
services.description: Access control, observability, audit paths, workflow support, and operating routines for long-term ownership.

team.name: Peter O. Oluoch
team.bio: Founder of Codegx Technologies and Wakala OS, focused on dependable software platforms, governed operating infrastructure, and operational intelligence systems.
